testcase.name: testCreateOrder_EmptyLines

testcase.name: testCreateOrder_Success
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-06T05:16:51.042+03:00 INFO 95332 --- [order-service] [ main] c.retailr.order.service.CustomerService : Customer created with id: 24, email: test@example.com 2026-06-06T05:16:51.044+03:00 INFO 95332 --- [order-service] [ main] com.retailr.order.service.OrderService : Order created with id: 15, orderNumber: ORD-5F993026, customerId: 24

testcase.name: testCalculateOrderTotal_Correct
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-06T05:16:51.051+03:00 INFO 95332 --- [order-service] [ main] c.retailr.order.service.CustomerService : Customer created with id: 25, email: test@example.com 2026-06-06T05:16:51.053+03:00 INFO 95332 --- [order-service] [ main] com.retailr.order.service.OrderService : Order created with id: 16, orderNumber: ORD-EEE17B0F, customerId: 25

testcase.name: testDeleteOrder_FailsIfNotDraft
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-06T05:16:51.058+03:00 INFO 95332 --- [order-service] [ main] c.retailr.order.service.CustomerService : Customer created with id: 26, email: test@example.com 2026-06-06T05:16:51.059+03:00 INFO 95332 --- [order-service] [ main] com.retailr.order.service.OrderService : Order created with id: 17, orderNumber: ORD-DB7AC698, customerId: 26 2026-06-06T05:16:51.060+03:00 INFO 95332 --- [order-service] [ main] com.retailr.order.service.OrderService : Order status updated: orderId=17, orderNumber=ORD-DB7AC698, newStatus=FULFILLED

testcase.name: testGetOrderByNumber_Success
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-06T05:16:51.066+03:00 INFO 95332 --- [order-service] [ main] c.retailr.order.service.CustomerService : Customer created with id: 27, email: test@example.com 2026-06-06T05:16:51.068+03:00 INFO 95332 --- [order-service] [ main] com.retailr.order.service.OrderService : Order created with id: 18, orderNumber: ORD-064C3BD6, customerId: 27

testcase.name: testDeleteOrder_DraftOnly
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-06T05:16:51.073+03:00 INFO 95332 --- [order-service] [ main] c.retailr.order.service.CustomerService : Customer created with id: 28, email: test@example.com 2026-06-06T05:16:51.075+03:00 INFO 95332 --- [order-service] [ main] com.retailr.order.service.OrderService : Order created with id: 19, orderNumber: ORD-650DDB5E, customerId: 28 2026-06-06T05:16:51.077+03:00 INFO 95332 --- [order-service] [ main] com.retailr.order.service.OrderService : Order deleted with id: 19

testcase.name: testCreateOrder_CustomerNotFound
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-06T05:16:51.082+03:00 INFO 95332 --- [order-service] [ main] c.retailr.order.service.CustomerService : Customer created with id: 29, email: test@example.com

testcase.name: testGetCustomerOrders_Pagination
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-06T05:16:51.087+03:00 INFO 95332 --- [order-service] [ main] c.retailr.order.service.CustomerService : Customer created with id: 30, email: test@example.com 2026-06-06T05:16:51.088+03:00 INFO 95332 --- [order-service] [ main] com.retailr.order.service.OrderService : Order created with id: 20, orderNumber: ORD-61851EDC, customerId: 30 2026-06-06T05:16:51.089+03:00 INFO 95332 --- [order-service] [ main] com.retailr.order.service.OrderService : Order created with id: 21, orderNumber: ORD-0BCA4F18, customerId: 30 2026-06-06T05:16:51.090+03:00 INFO 95332 --- [order-service] [ main] com.retailr.order.service.OrderService : Order created with id: 22, orderNumber: ORD-694757CF, customerId: 30

testcase.name: testCancelOrder_Success
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-06T05:16:51.098+03:00 INFO 95332 --- [order-service] [ main] c.retailr.order.service.CustomerService : Customer created with id: 31, email: test@example.com 2026-06-06T05:16:51.100+03:00 INFO 95332 --- [order-service] [ main] com.retailr.order.service.OrderService : Order created with id: 23, orderNumber: ORD-AFAE7C24, customerId: 31 2026-06-06T05:16:51.102+03:00 INFO 95332 --- [order-service] [ main] com.retailr.order.service.OrderService : Order cancelled with id: 23, orderNumber: ORD-AFAE7C24

testcase.name: testGetOrder_Success

testcase.name: testUpdateOrderStatus_Success
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-06T05:16:51.114+03:00 INFO 95332 --- [order-service] [ main] c.retailr.order.service.CustomerService : Customer created with id: 33, email: test@example.com 2026-06-06T05:16:51.115+03:00 INFO 95332 --- [order-service] [ main] com.retailr.order.service.OrderService : Order created with id: 25, orderNumber: ORD-C80C5584, customerId: 33 2026-06-06T05:16:51.116+03:00 INFO 95332 --- [order-service] [ main] com.retailr.order.service.OrderService : Order status updated: orderId=25, orderNumber=ORD-C80C5584, newStatus=FULFILLED

testcase.name: testGetOrder_NotFound
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-06T05:16:51.131+03:00 INFO 95332 --- [order-service] [ main] c.retailr.order.service.CustomerService : Customer created with id: 35, email: test@example.com
